name: McDaniel for Senate
subject: On the Trail with Chris: Independence Day, Hyde-Smith votes for Clinton
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
Cindy Hyde-Smith voted for Hillary Clinton in the 2008 primaries. While not a surprise to any of us, this news also means that Hyde-Smith lied to us when she said she couldn’t remember who she voted for back when she was a Democrat. Mississippi rejected Hillary Clinton overwhelmingly, yet the establishment in Washington wants us to accept one of her supporters as someone who is supposed to represent us. | | | | [ ](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-r/)
---
Peter,
Cindy Hyde-Smith voted for Hillary Clinton in the 2008 primaries.
While not a surprise to any of us, this news also means that Hyde-Smith lied to us when she said she couldn’t remember who she voted for back when she was a Democrat.
Mississippi rejected Hillary Clinton overwhelmingly, yet the establishment in Washington wants us to accept one of her supporters as someone who is supposed to represent us.
That’s why I’m running for this Senate seat. To give the people of Mississippi the kind of conservative leadership they expect out of their leaders.
I won’t let you down.
\- Chris
* * *
**On The Trail**
**LAUREL**
Team McDaniel was out at the All-Star State Baseball Tournament at the Sportsplex in Laurel all weekend long.
\---------------
**ELLISVILLE**
Chris spent some time at the Hunters Lodge in Ellisville meeting with proud defenders of our 2nd Amendment.
\---------------
**JACINTO**
Chris had a great time speaking at and meeting with people at the 34th Annual July 4th Festival in Jacinto. Thank you Alcorn County!
\---------------
**TUPELO**
Chris enjoyed stopping at Ballard Park in Tupelo! Great way to cap off Independence Day!
\---------------
**NEW ALBANY**
It was great seeing such a packed house of conservatives in New Albany. Now is the time to unite conservatives together.
\---------------
**GUNTOWN**
Chris stopped by the Independence Day Festival in Guntown to meet with people. As a Second Amendment supporter, how can you not love a city named Guntown?
\---------------
**ITAWAMBA COUNTY**
We had a packed house at the Bethel Church in Itawamba County. The outpouring of support has simply been incredible.
* * *
**ICYMI**
**_Mark Levin: Cindy Hyde-Smith an Establishment Liberal_**
During his show on Friday, conservative radio personality Mark Levin referred to Mississippi’s appointed Senator, Cindy Hyde-Smith, as a liberal, and urged voters to reject her. “So, you have this liberal who will be a Susan Collins Maine liberal, a Lisa Murkowski Alaska liberal out of Mississippi,” Levin said. [Read the full article by clicking here.](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-y/)
\---------------
**_[AUDIO] Mark Levin Goes Off on Cindy Hyde-Smith_**
Hear Mark Levin in his own words talking about Cindy Hyde-Smith voting for Hillary Clinton in the Democratic primaries in 2008, and why we need a real conservative representing Mississippi. [You can listen to the audio clip by clicking here.](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-j/)
[](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-t/)
* * *
**Support Our Campaign**
Our campaign is built on the support of people like you. Every dollar that we raise -- no matter how big or small -- gets us one step closer to draining the Swamp in November.
[Please consider chipping in and supporting our campaign!](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-i/)
[Chip in $10](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-h/)
[Chip in $25](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-u/)
[Chip in $50](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-b/)
[Chip in $100](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-p/)
Thank you!
Team McDaniel
[DONATE](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-c/)
| [](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-q/) [](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-a/)[](https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-biliihd-ydllhlurty-f/)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Steve=20Smith=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Just 21 Days Until Ballots Drop! We Need Your Help!!!
body:
Would you make a phone call to keep Nancy Pelosi from becoming the Speaker of the House again? -- | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/stevesmithaz.com/july10volunteer-2666419?e=1fa29a1af8)
---
| |
---
| | **Dea****r ****Fellow Patriot****,** **Just 21 Days Until People Start Voting! ** **We Urgently Need Your Help to Reach Every Republican Voter in CD1 This Month!** **Arizona's First Congressional District has been identified as **_**the most likely seat in the nation to flip from Democrat to Republican**_**, but that's only going to happen if we have the strongest candidate possible to challenge the incumbent Democrat Tom O'Halleran.** **Steve Smith is the only Republican candidate in the CD1 race with a proven record of diligently defending conservative values, and a proven record of defeating entrenched Democrats.** I know you understand all of this, that's why you're receiving this email, but do your friends and neighbors know what's at stake? We urgently need your help getting this message out to fellow Republicans in your neighborhood and across this huge district! There are only _**three weeks left**_ before early ballots go out and we need your help to reach those Republican voters! _Here's How You Can Help!_ _**You Can Walk:**_ We have organized _walks listed below_ , or you can just walk the few blocks _around your home_ to pass out information, inform your neighbors, and get permission to place yard signs. (You have a sign in your yard, right?)
We'll provide you with everything you need to effectively walk your area to reach Republicans who might not know about Steve and this important race. _**You Can Phone:**_ We have organized _phone banks listed below_ , or you can use our simple system to make phone calls at your convenience from your own home. We'll provide you with phone numbers and information on exactly what to say. They'll see our number, not yours. __**If you can just give us an hour of calling, that's a tremendous help.**__ **The time is now! Let’s **_**Get Out the Vote for Steve Smith**_** so we can flip this district from Democrat to Republican!** Reply to this email or call **Linda at 516-784-9417 **to let us know how you can help, or learn about other opportunities. If you travel within the district, we often need signs or brochures dropped off or picked up. Let Linda know if you can help. _**Please come and support us at these upcoming Volunteer Events:**_ _**Casa Grande**_** **_**Friday**_** **_**July 13**_ _**th**_ \-- We are meeting on Friday July 13th from 3:00 – 7:00PM in _**Casa Grande**_** ** for _**phone banking.**_ No experience necessary, we will show you how easy it is!
Please join us at: **Steve Smith for Congress at Arizona Plaza **
**408 N Sacaton St, Suite H**
**Casa Grande, AZ 85122** **Swing by our office any time to get a walk list or help us phone bank there! Casa Grande volunteers are walking and calling throughout the week. Come by and learn how you can help out.** _**Oro Valley**_** **_**Saturday**_** **_**July 14**_ _**th**_** ****\--** This Saturday morning July 14th at 10:00 AM come support Steve at the _LD 11 Debate_ in Oro Valley at: **The Oro Valley Library **
**1305 W Naranja Dr.**
**Oro Valley, AZ 85737**

__**Come see us after the debate and learn how you can help make phone calls.**__ _**Coolidge**_** **_**Saturday**_** **_**July 14**_ _**th**_** ****\--** If you live near Coolidge, please join Christina at 9:00 AM at: **McDonald’s
900 N Arizona Blvd
Coolidge, AZ 85128** **For further information and directions, please RSVP Christina at 520-424-4961. Even if you aren't up to walking, you can still help by driving other volunteers.** _**Flagstaff**_** **_**Saturday**_** **_**July 14**_ _**th**_** ****\--** If you live in Flagstaff, please join our team at 9:00 AM at**:** **4178 S Pheasant Run Dr.
Flagstaff, AZ 86005** Please RSVP at **928-226-0502.** _**Maricopa**_** **_**Saturday**_** **_**July 14**_ _**th**_** and **_**Sunday**_** **_**July 15**_ _**th**_** ****\-- **If you live in **Maricopa** , we are meeting Saturday July 14 and Sunday July 15 at 9:00 AM at: **Quick Trip
20530 John Wayne Pkwy
Maricopa, AZ 85139** Please RSVP to** Linda 516-784-9417** if you can help us Saturday or Sunday in Maricopa so we can make sure we have walk lists for you. _**Help us send Mr. Smith to Washington!**_

Invite people who want to know more about Steve to visit [_SteveSmithAZ.com_](https://SteveSmithAZ.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=744cc59eec9e4f21a849aa145&id=58f8329870&e=1fa29a1af8).

**Thank you for your support, and God Bless.**

Linda Lee Murtha
Deputy Campaign Manager
Steve Smith for Congress

subject: inhumane attack on healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
Friends, the GOP is merciless.
Senate Republicans have been trying to undermine the Affordable Care Act since the day it was signed into law, but their latest attempt is just unconscionable.
President Trump and the GOP are working to take away protections for people with preexisting conditions - those who need health care the most. **It 's a disgusting, inhumane attack on the health of millions of Americans.**
If their scheme works, premiums for people with preexisting conditions will skyrocket, forcing thousands of Granite Staters and countless Americans off their plans altogether. **Access to good, affordable health care is a right, and no American should be excluded - no matter their medical history.**
**That 's why I'm calling on Donald Trump and the GOP to end their assault on Americans who need care, but I still need 300 people to stand with me by midnight. Please, **[add your name right now to tell Donald Trump: Stop attacking the Affordable Care Act!](https://petitions.signforgood.com/ProtectTheAffordableCareAct?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=shaheen&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FCJS-HealthCare%3Fcode%3Djtk862-ja-nd)****
Thank you,
Jeanne

name: The White House
subject: This morning in Europe
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=429070d0b5e94f3d87b1b6b2e16635ba060f345aec3ea9f4dbe8945ae5fedd96e32e4df6c88ad519102c8113f719d1f8de387e81f8821ae6) The White House • July 11, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump continues his European trip, participating in a welcoming ceremony in Belgium with First Lady Melania Trump. [Watch live at 1:10 p.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=429070d0b5e94f3d5686c01d95c369c27d77c3981a67cb6dc7376ebce14ed65f608dfa17b79397d3aef277c01a095f7c9517744fe19c3b0d) |
---
|

## This morning in Europe
**As the NATO summit began** in Brussels, President Trump delivered a clear message to America’s allies: The transatlantic Alliance is too important not to invest in. “The United States is paying far too much, and other countries are not paying enough,” the President said this morning.
**NATO Secretary General Jens Stoltenberg** echoed that goal. “We will continue to focus on defense spending, because as the President just said, NATO Allies have to invest more in defense, and that’s not exactly what they’re doing,” he said. President Trump thanked the Secretary General for working hard to make progress. “He understands the problem.”
**While former President Obama** also urged our NATO allies to share the defense burden, President Trump is the one getting results. Since President Trump took office, each member state has increased its defense spending: In 2017 alone, we saw an increase of more than 4.8 percent in defense spending among our NATO Allies. “But that’s not nearly enough,” President Trump makes clear.
[Watch President Trump meet with NATO leadership in Brussels this morning.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=429070d0b5e94f3d3954f4f96f5e19789929494d5a387ead8e0a91478e0338c9ac9cb065b4d9e2c3c80a0287e8d9effa6698de35bbe6856f)
**Why it matters** : [America’s lasting commitment to NATO](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=429070d0b5e94f3d092f211dacd7c87d7fc8a216abaddaa43d39a1def51055aeead421567c83de32028b964b531008c2574e8fecebf50a4a)

---
|

## Support builds for President Trump’s Supreme Court nominee
**Judge Brett Kavanaugh is widely admired** as a brilliant jurist with impeccable legal credentials, and those qualifications are earning him widespread support on Capitol Hill and beyond. In less than 48 hours since President Trump announced Judge Kavanaugh as his nominee for the High Court, nearly 100 members of Congress and counting have expressed their support.
**Former President George W. Bush weighed in** , as well. “President Trump has made an outstanding decision in nominating Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. Brett is a brilliant jurist who has faithfully applied the Constitution and laws throughout his 12 years on the D.C. Circuit,” the former President says.
**Senate leaders agree**. “President Trump has made a superb choice,” Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) says. Senate Judiciary Committee Chairman Chuck Grassley (R-IA) adds that “Judge Kavanaugh is one of the most qualified Supreme Court nominees to come before the Senate.”
[See the growing support for Judge Kavanaugh to serve on the Supreme Court.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=429070d0b5e94f3de53fbab68df8b9d7965747b3cac19ed7afd4c4abba6fa5b9e803ebf849d67c51ca044283a6038995a2de460afb912f6d)
**More** : [President Trump’s historically transparent process for choosing a nominee ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=429070d0b5e94f3d20561ab2f416ce9293266d4223fcb8cf38f80e9efc983ca31329ab49c73ccf15e0c8428c21029be00ea0a46744b8f8ff)

---
|

**President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump depart for Brussels, Belgium** | July 10, 2018

name: Anthony Pardal
subject: No excuses
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| Friends and Neighbors -- Late last week, it was reported that current Chief Financial Officer Jimmy Patronis had used his role on the State's Clemency Board to ask applicants how often they go to church or how many children they had and by how many women. **Questions that have nothing to do with the ability of an individual looking to have their civil rights restored.** Since that time, Jimmy's friends in the Cabinet have rushed to his defense, including our current Attorney General, Pam Bondi. By asking the applicants these kind of questions, Patronis was "just trying to get to know them better", Bondi said. **[Well now video from the hearing in question is out, so you can judge for yourself.](https://act.myngp.com/el/mJd7jkOqKa74SbHNBreP1s7rnsQhv-aqs000t9itHbo=/uzVGKpT7jrIapV3ZewoxOCgOKXDCVSnFTaUIJeXY5XE=)** It gets worse, instead of doing the right thing and apologizing, **[Patronis has decided to double down on his previous comments](https://act.myngp.com/el/mJd7jkOqKa74SbHNBreP1s7rnsQhv-aqs000t9itHbo=/Pn0zbkqbOebFUDlJmT7q9zGe5d75eSHyG0tIbEiRhTw=)** , proving over and again what a federal judge has already ruled, Florida's existing process for rights restoration is nothing more than a "nonsensical scheme" with "mythical standards" that must be changed. The Patronis campaign and those backing it will continue to make excuses, but the fact remains: This type of questioning is not only insensitive, it is intolerant.**And it has no place on the Clemency Board.** Everyone deserves a second chance and as our next CFO, Jeremy would take the Clemency Board in a very different direction - including advocating for the automatic restoration of the civil rights for non-violent offenders. But we still have an election to win. **And we need your help, now more than ever.** **[Can you contribute $20.18 or more today, to help Jeremy get to the Cabinet?](https://act.myngp.com/el/mJd7jkOqKa74SbHNBreP1s7rnsQhv-aqs000t9itHbo=/AXxS3NPjCFbs8U3oezRmyO3_GL5pFRU7zF5ECViwVXE=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&)** Thank you for all of your support, **Anthony** \- Anthony Pardal, Campaign Manager - Jeremy Ring for Florida CFO \---------- Forwarded message ---------- [](https://act.myngp.com/el/mJd7jkOqKa74SbHNBreP1s7rnsQhv-aqs000t9itHbo=/WExpjfqyrlj1l_JMRUonlflNrT46SPWNEFy6kv1GcJw=) Just imagine -- after years of waiting -- finally having the opportunity to get your civil rights back in form of the ability to vote. Wouldn't it feel like a brand new opportunity, a fresh start? But what if the first question you get, in the process, is _" how many kids do you have?"_ And _" How many different mothers are there, for each of those children?"_ You would be taken aback, right? I know I was, when I **[read the new report today in the _Florida Phoenix_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mJd7jkOqKa74SbHNBreP1s7rnsQhv-aqs000t9itHbo=/0Rb_242mi_2Oi4JtE0C6Bc8NEYXCwz50Di9mkfqV1s4=)** , detailing some of the uncomfortable - and incredibly tone deaf - questions asked of applicants seeking to have their voting rights restored by the current State Clemency Board, on which our current Chief Financial Officer, (CFO), Jimmy Patronis, sits. A line of questioning CFO Patronis actively participated in. **This is totally unacceptable.** It is unconscionable that applicants would be asked in a public hearing how many children and how many different mothers of those children. Not only should that have zero to do with Mr. Jones ability to have his rights restored, but smacks of racism, intolerance and ignorance. CFO Patronis should issue an immediate apology. [Help JR Get to the Cabinet. Contribute $20.18. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/mJd7jkOqKa74SbHNBreP1s7rnsQhv-aqs000t9itHbo=/AXxS3NPjCFbs8U3oezRmyO3_GL5pFRU7zF5ECViwVXE=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) This is just another example of why the current Florida Clemency process is unfair and tainted. It's no wonder a Federal Judge recently ruled that Governor Scott and the Florida Cabinet issued a ruling to reform the entire practice of rights restoration. Currently, the clemency process is used to not only suppress votes but to ensure that "all" non violent ex-felons are never given an opportunity to lift themselves up and pursue their dreams. **And it 's another reason why I threw my hat into the "ring" for this race.** As your next CFO, I would make reforming our Clemency process a top priority, to make sure that all applicants are treated fairly and equally and that the restoration of civil rights are the focus of all proceedings, not stereotypical, irrelevant lines of questioning. But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't do it without your help****.** [**Can you contribute $20.18 or more today, to help me reform our Clemency process and bring fairness back to the Cabinet?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mJd7jkOqKa74SbHNBreP1s7rnsQhv-aqs000t9itHbo=/AXxS3NPjCFbs8U3oezRmyO3_GL5pFRU7zF5ECViwVXE=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

subject: GOP doesn't want you to have health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Republicans in Washington are on a mission to destroy health care. Back in May, the White House asked Congress to cut $7 billion from the Children's Health Insurance Program -- which provides insurance for 9 million children. The Republican Congress has tried time and again to repeal the Affordable Care Act, with no viable plan to replace it, threatening the health care of millions of Americans. The most recent Republican budget cuts billions of dollars from Medicare and Medicaid -- threatening reliable health insurance for seniors and the disabled community. **No matter who you are, at what stage of life or health, Republicans are coming after your health care.** It's a thousand percent clear to me that Republicans are working for the insurance companies, not patients and families. I will fight them tooth-and-nail to protect the ACA, Medicare, Medicare, CHIP, and access to affordable health care for all of us. [**Demand the Trump administration and Republicans in Congress stop their relentless attacks on our health care >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f03/622b7b5b/1bb2e185/307b9e57/792354974/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180709b") Thank you. Debbie

We cannot sit out on our right to choose the candidate we want to represent our party and our country. We can take back the House. We can unseat Ann Wagner. And we can put representatives in public office who truly care about, advocate for, and understand our district. So let's get the vote out! [Click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/2BL_LXMpSsaD1VcnnK97Sbhvh5la4hkUDa6Lcf_XVU8=/MK5PGyof2QFV9Aq-RVuwI7030ZxD5devz6otkMhmOSQ=) to check your voter registration status _[Click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/2BL_LXMpSsaD1VcnnK97Sbhvh5la4hkUDa6Lcf_XVU8=/V-dEhwXN75jM2HjwjPs9DiSUYbkCqoBXY4rK01yYrO8=)_ to **register to vote** Out of town on August 7th? Check out [this video](https://act.myngp.com/el/2BL_LXMpSsaD1VcnnK97Sbhvh5la4hkUDa6Lcf_XVU8=/V5JKqjpAjjnKGcRJr0lRm0ykHV_ZKfjmUrpSqbXu6Bk=?hc_ref=ARSbQfpWVOucUhd7W97QJRmQQGjs7lilwWUghcWsafoEhOafcn6Tq7vqIbiS6sf5f80&fref=nf) promoting Mark and the race. name: Ben Jealous
subject: "Too risky."
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
This is why we need to fight.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a69a/7ab0e2c4/7fe09cee/349b92e8/1804971762/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-mdmn?refcode=OHQ07118A") Friend, "Too risky." "Too extreme." "Pie in the sky." That's what Larry Hogan is calling me and my campaign for a more progressive Maryland. Can I be honest? If an agenda that pays working folks more money by raising our minimum wage, makes college free for Maryland students, and makes healthcare more affordable through Medicare-for-All, is "too extreme" that's pretty sad. **But that's who Larry Hogan is -- and it's exactly why Maryland is standing still. It's time for Maryland to do big things again, which is why I'm asking you to support this campaign before our mid-month deadline.** [**We need to raise $25,000 by July 13th, can you help with a donation of $5 or more right now?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a69a/7ab0e2c4/7fe09cee/349b92e8/1804971762/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-mdmn?refcode=OHQ07118A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a69a/7ab0e2c4/7fe09cee/349b92eb/1804971762/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-mdmn?amount=5&refcode=OHQ07118A&express_lane=true")

We knew this fight wouldn't be easy. We knew going into the general election that Larry Hogan had $9 million to spend right away. And he sure is spending it fast.
He already has ads up throughout Maryland that call me a, "risky blend of ideological extremism and recklessness."
Democrats outnumber Republicans 2-to-1 in Maryland, and our primary win shows they're ready for a more progressive and more equal state. Larry Hogan won an incredibly close election in 2014 by riding a Republican tidal wave. We know what we're expecting in 2018, but if we want a blue wave, we need the funds to fight.
**Larry Hogan's looking at every dollar we raise to gauge our momentum.** [**That's why I'm asking you to help raise $25,000 before July 13th -- donate $5 or more now to show Larry you're ready for a blue wave in Maryland.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a69a/7ab0e2c4/7fe09cee/349b92e8/1804971762/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-mdmn?refcode=OHQ07118A")
Thanks,
Ben

subject: 30 women running to replace 30 Republicans who voted to repeal Obamacare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4320/24c69fd9/185f3d1f6/188297ac/326241816/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES22N_digital_email_20180711_ThanksObamacare_inact&source=WQEFES22N_digital_email_20180711_ThanksObamacare_inact")
---

Peter,

It's been a year since Republicans almost repealed Obamacare.

We're lucky they failed.

The GOP's repeal plans last year would have gutted the law -- kicking millions of Americans off their insurance, defunding Planned Parenthood, and banning abortion coverage in certain plans.

We have to make sure Republicans understand the consequences of threatening health insurance for millions of Americans.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to replace anti-Obamacare Republicans.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4320/24c69fd9/185f3d1f6/188297ad/326241816/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180711_email_ThanksObamacare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFES22N_digital_email_20180711_ThanksObamacare_inact&source=WQEFES22N_digital_email_20180711_ThanksObamacare_inact")**

Obamacare made it so insurers can't charge women more than men just because they're women. Folks can no longer be denied coverage because of pre-existing conditions. The law set up no copay birth control and guaranteed coverage for cancer screenings, maternity care, and prenatal care.

If we want to protect Obamacare, we have to replace Republicans who voted to repeal it.

So we've endorsed two women for the Senate and 28 for the House to do just that: take their seats.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women replace Republicans who voted to repeal Obamacare:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Protect-Obamacare-from-Republicans](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4320/24c69fd9/185f3d1f6/188297ae/326241816/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180711_email_ThanksObamacare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgProtectObamacare&utm_campaign=WQEFES22N_digital_email_20180711_ThanksObamacare_inact&source=WQEFES22N_digital_email_20180711_ThanksObamacare_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

| **INSTANT POLL: Should the Trump administration be held accountable to the separated immigrant families who, at this rate, may NEVER be reunited?** | [YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/lBMU-rxS5mUE5nGn4HeaYNUAp-voYO7LTtrUs72mY_I=/CW1fYdVHI9M0ENb70R6XeXWTYgfW-BX5dDFUbD0JKFw=) | [NO](https://act.myngp.com/el/lBMU-rxS5mUE5nGn4HeaYNUAp-voYO7LTtrUs72mY_I=/CW1fYdVHI9M0ENb70R6XeXWTYgfW-BX5dDFUbD0JKFw=)
---|---

Peter,

After instituting a policy of separating children at the border, detaining their parents, and sending children -- some as young as 18 months -- to foster homes across the country, the Trump administration was ordered to reunite children under 5 with their parents by Tuesday, July 10th.

They managed to reunite less than half of those children before the deadline. They'd obviously never planned to have to bring these families back together.

**Help us make sure the administration hears us loud and clear: this is unacceptable.**

**Record your response before Friday, July 13th.**

**INSTANT POLL: Should the Trump administration be held accountable to the separated immigrant families who, at this rate, may NEVER be reunited?** | [YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/lBMU-rxS5mUE5nGn4HeaYNUAp-voYO7LTtrUs72mY_I=/CW1fYdVHI9M0ENb70R6XeXWTYgfW-BX5dDFUbD0JKFw=) | [NO](https://act.myngp.com/el/lBMU-rxS5mUE5nGn4HeaYNUAp-voYO7LTtrUs72mY_I=/CW1fYdVHI9M0ENb70R6XeXWTYgfW-BX5dDFUbD0JKFw=)

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Give me a moment to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
It all adds up.
#

Peter -
I know we're sending you a lot of emails right now. So I want to take a moment to explain why these emails and your contribution are so important today. Will you hear me out?
This Thursday is our first fundraising deadline -- the first time we will publicly report how much we've raised and more importantly how many people are funding our campaign for Attorney General.
Here's the thing: We expect our opponents to outraise us. We're running against Albany and Wall Street's hand-picked candidates, and they're compromising their independence to take money from corporate PACs and LLCs.
But the truth is we don't have to outraise them. We just need to make sure we don't fall too far behind, and these emails are how we do that. The overwhelming majority of our donations come from supporters like you giving small amounts of money in response to emails like this. That adds up. Big time.
So that's why I'm asking:
**[Can you make a $3 donation right now before tomorrow's deadline? Every donation matters. Each one sends a message about the strength of our campaign.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ebb/6e822e2f/1bcfb408/41727c52/1959886909/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTEtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180711-1-full")**
I'm proud of how we're funding this campaign. The New York Attorney General is supposed to be the people's attorney, which means the people must have no doubt about her independence. She must be willing to root out corruption wherever it may exist.
So if you're able to add a contribution, it would go a long way. Thank you again for standing with us.
Best,
Zephyr Teachout

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Roe v. Wade is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
This is not a drill: The future of Roe v. Wade is on the line this November.
President Trump just announced Brett Kavanaugh as his Supreme Court nominee to replace Justice Anthony Kennedy. This appointment could alter the highest court in the land for decades to come - and I cannot support any nominee who would vote to overturn Roe v. Wade.
If you care about a woman's right to choose, then I need you to stand up and fight back now. The only way to prevent this disaster is by flipping the Senate blue - and to do that, we need to hold every single Democratic seat.
I'll never stop fighting for women's rights, but I can't do it alone. **I need to raise another $9,417 by midnight, but with just hours left, we 're coming up short - [so I'm counting on you to give $5 now to help me protect the future of the Supreme Court and women's right to choose:](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne-shaheen?refcode=jtk874-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne-shaheen?refcode=jtk874-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne-shaheen?refcode=jtk874-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jeanne-shaheen?refcode=jtk874-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,
Jeanne

name: Bob Menendez
subject: We must reject Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

On Monday, President Trump announced his pick of Brett Kavanaugh for the Supreme Court.

If Kavanaugh is confirmed, the consequences would be frightening. I voted against Neil Gorsuch because I knew his partisan take on the law would have devastating effects for average Americans. And that's precisely what he's proven to be.

**And Kavanaugh has proven himself to be even more extreme.**

If Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell get their way, this Supreme Court justice will change the balance of this court for a generation. That's decades of bad decisions. The stakes have never been higher.

[**If we are going to build a better future for every New Jersey family, we cannot stack the Supreme Court with far-right extremists. Add your name if you agree >>>**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c92/3af3c5d/3b7db812/4ec3851b/2542228057/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/TrumpNominationV3?gpsid=5_73_1949&source=em18_180711_KavNm3_engg_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180711_KavNm3_engg_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1+-+If+we+are+going+to+build+a+better+future")

Brett Kavanaugh is a proven conservative extremist who if confirmed to the Supreme Court bench will undo years of progress we have made as a country.

His views on women's healthcare rights, the intersection of religion and government, and the Affordable Care Act show that he is only interested in pushing Trump and Hugin's extreme right agenda. New Jersey does not want or deserve that.

I want each of you to know that I will vote no on this nomination. It is a clear attack on women's health, voter, worker, LGBTQ, and immigration rights. We must reject the nomination.

[**I need you to stand with me on this and make your voice heard. Add your name today.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c92/3af3c5d/3b7db812/4ec3851a/2542228057/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/TrumpNominationV3?gpsid=5_73_1949&source=em18_180711_KavNm3_engg_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180711_KavNm3_engg_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+I+need+you+to+stand+with+me+on+this+and+")

Thank you,

Bob

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37e6/9e00690/591a7bab/2402c63d/2461699550/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180711_volfld_fld_gq_act__MD_ettx&source=em18_180711_volfld_fld_gq_act__MD_ettx")
Friends,

With less than 50 days to go until primary day, Andrew is surging in the Florida Governor's race.

We've been running a true grassroots people-powered campaign -- and whether it's knocking on doors, making phone calls, helping folks register to vote, or just chipping in a few dollars when you can, Andrew's gotten to this far thanks to you. Just yesterday, we opened up a field office in Miami and are holding a statewide Go Gillum Day of Action this Saturday!

**But now, we need your help to cross the finish line -- can you[help us out in the field](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37e6/9e00690/591a7bab/2402c63c/2461699550/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/volunteer-with-andrew-gillum-for-governor-July?gpsid=13_55_1968&source=em18_180711_volfld_fld_gq_act__MD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180711_volfld_fld_gq_act__MD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+help+us+out+in+the+field") or [make a donation](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37e6/9e00690/591a7bab/2402c63f/2461699550/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-july-2018?gpsid=13_55_1966&refcode=em18_180711_volfld_fnd_gq_act__DM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180711_volfld_fnd_gq_act__DM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+make+a+donation") today? Every helping hand counts.**
---
[Yes! I can volunteer](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37e6/9e00690/591a7bab/2402c63e/2461699550/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/volunteer-with-andrew-gillum-for-governor-July?gpsid=13_55_1968&source=em18_180711_volfld_fld_gq_act__MD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180711_volfld_fld_gq_act__MD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=4+-+Yes+I+can+volunteer") | [Yes! Andrew's spent the last 16 months traveling to every corner of the state, listening to everyday Floridians, and laying out a progressive vision to help rebuild our state. With your help, we're going to elect a true progressive and take back the Governor's mansion.

So please, let us know if you're ready to elect Andrew Gillum as Florida's next Governor.

**[I'm ready to volunteer! Let me know how I can get involved.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37e6/9e00690/591a7bab/2402c630/2461699550/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/volunteer-with-andrew-gillum-for-governor-July?gpsid=13_55_1968&source=em18_180711_volfld_fld_gq_act__MD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180711_volfld_fld_gq_act__MD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=6+-+Irsquom+ready+to+volunteer+Let+me+know+h")**

**[I can't volunteer now, but I'll chip in $5 to support Andrew's campaign!](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37e6/9e00690/591a7bab/2402c633/2461699550/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-july-2018?gpsid=13_55_1966&refcode=em18_180711_volfld_fnd_gq_act__DM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180711_volfld_fnd_gq_act__DM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=7+-+I+cant+volunteer+now+but+Ill+chip+in+5+t")**

Thank you,

David Metellus
Deputy Organizing Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor

P.S. It'll be all hands on deck this Saturday, so if you'd like to participate **[click here, enter your zip code,](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37e6/9e00690/591a7bab/2402c632/2461699550/VEsO/ "http://events.andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=8+-+click+here+enter+your+zip+code&utm_campaign=em18_180711_volfld_fld_gq_act__MD_ettx&source=em18_180711_volfld_fld_gq_act__MD_ettx#zipcode=&distance=50&sort=time&f%5B%5D=volunteer-activity-or-meeting")** and you'll be directed to a Go Gillum Day of Action event site near you!

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

Tallahassee, FL 32303

body:
Hi friend,
I wanted to make sure you saw Gabe's message. We only have five days left to gather signatures, and we need your help. **[Please click here now to register for a signature gathering event near you!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0ff/5e076a9e/543c8ff6/144266bd/3598059536/VEsH/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/jpC7KxRG0kWga2lT8a8tHg2")**
Many thanks,
Gina
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Gabe Amo (info@ginaraimondo.com)
Date: 7/09/18, 1:52PM
Subject: 1,000 signatures
Hey friend,
In order for Gina to appear on the ballot this November, we need to gather 1,000 signatures in the next 7 days -- and we need your help.
**[Click here to RSVP for a signature gathering event near you!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0ff/5e076a9e/543c8ff6/144266bd/3598059536/VEsE/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/jpC7KxRG0kWga2lT8a8tHg2")**
Your support will make sure that Rhode Island keeps moving in the right direction. Gina's leadership has helped us accomplish so much, from rebuilding our roads, bridges, and schools, to growing and strengthening our economy. There's so much more to do, and Gina's the person to lead the way. **[Will you help now by RSVPing to a signature gathering event near you?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0ff/5e076a9e/543c8ff6/144266bd/3598059536/VEsF/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/jpC7KxRG0kWga2lT8a8tHg2")**
Thank you,
Gabe Amo

---
| **Peter,**

President Trump has picked his second nominee for the highest court in the nation. His choice in Brett Kavanaugh is causing mass liberal hysteria and for good cause.

Kavanaugh's track record has been on the right side of all of these issues:
* On Life
* On Guns
* On Obamacare
* On Religious Liberty
* On the Constitution

With strict constitutionalists on our Supreme Court, the liberals know that their crooked leftist agendas will flail and falter now more than ever.

**The downside to our coming victory on the Supreme Court?**

__The left will get desperate. They will further ____mobilize activist judges in the lower courts.__
They will find other ways to push their horrid agendas: to kill the innocent, to take our guns, to destroy our healthcare, and to persecute our Christian faith.

We need a Senate that will control the circuit courts and all lower courts as instructed in Article 1, Section 8 of the Constitution.

**It is my mission to lead this charge.**

Every time a circuit court judge challenges our President's authority, our Senate stands silent.

**This kind of silence is a cowardice we should no longer tolerate.**

_U.S. Senators bear the responsibility for addressing and removing activist judges trying to push their unconstitutional and liberal agendas. Yet, when liberal circuit judges block the President's agenda, the Senate does nothing._

I will never stand silent as the left tries to weasel their agenda down our throats through the lower courts.

By supporting me now, I will become the next U.S. Senator for Missouri.

**My activism fighting and standing up against the radical left in the lower courts will be unprecedented.** I will be loud and I will be a leader in the fight.

The Senate should never be silent when the activist courts step out of line and defy the American people and our Constitution.

_**[Stand with me. We have four weeks. ](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=955139e76a&e=9da9b0ca31)**_

[_**I will be your fighter in this cause -- but not without your help today and now.**_](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=005472f291&e=9da9b0ca31)

May God be with our Leaders and with our Nation,

Courtland Sykes

name: Team Morse
subject: how Tom McClintock ignores our fire threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MIwj1EVtj9DifmSbcpSG4g3FZbtIuSbEQ-KX3k1-GhE=/URqr4Nv-4P7sYKozel2V3YdNs3MIW7-bRNfdro-VcMQ=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180711_TM_fire_all_logo)
Team,
Summer--smoke in the air and nonstop footage of California communities devastated by wildfires--highlights yet another of McClintock's failures: refusing to support fire prevention and disaster relief.
**We spend much more to fight and recover from fires than we do to prevent them, yet Tom McClintock votes consistently against funding proactive fire prevention. If you think our district deserves better, sign our one-click petition to tell Tom McClintock to treat wildfire as the threat it is:**
[I'M IN >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/MIwj1EVtj9DifmSbcpSG4g3FZbtIuSbEQ-KX3k1-GhE=/URqr4Nv-4P7sYKozel2V3YdNs3MIW7-bRNfdro-VcMQ=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180711_TM_fire_all_contribbutton1)
---

A forest fire doesn't care whether you're a Democrat or a Republican--and last year, most California Republicans voted in favor of federal aid for disaster victims, including victims of wildfires. **But McClintock voted no on helping homeowners who lost everything in fires.**
He's also voted to continue raiding fire prevention funds to fight existing fires--a fiscally irresponsible solution. **And the tax plan he supported makes it harder for Californians to recoup their losses after these disasters.**
McClintock isn't just failing to help protect our communities. He's leaving them even more vulnerable to destruction. (Maybe it would help if he actually lived in the district...)
Representing our district means prioritizing the issues our district faces. [_**With more than 2,600 wildfires reported across California this year --and two currently burning in our district--click now to tell Tom McClintock to take our fire threat seriously.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/MIwj1EVtj9DifmSbcpSG4g3FZbtIuSbEQ-KX3k1-GhE=/cA1YS8L8Dk_unllW5GxBozxLpGnAAXvNmohGEMOuhMI=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180711_TM_fire_all_l1)
Thank you,
Team Morse

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: (bump)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Please take a minute to read the email Zephyr sent this morning.

Hey there, Peter. We wanted to bump Zephyr's note from this morning to the top of your inbox. It's an important one about this deadline.
Please, take a minute to read it and then chip in $3 to our campaign to root out corruption wherever it may exist. You can do that here:
**[go.ZephyrForNY.com/deadline](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eb9/6e822e2f/1bcca0e0/4172736a/3539678016/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTEtMi1iIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180711-2-b")**
Thank you for being with us in this fight. This is about the grassroots vs. big money, and your support means so much to Zephyr.
All our best,
\- Team Zephyr
* * *
#

Peter -
I know we're sending you a lot of emails right now. So I want to take a moment to explain why these emails and your contribution are so important today. Will you hear me out?
This Thursday is our first fundraising deadline -- the first time we will publicly report how much we've raised and more importantly how many people are funding our campaign for Attorney General.
Here's the thing: We expect our opponents to outraise us. We're running against Albany and Wall Street's hand-picked candidates, and they're compromising their independence to take money from corporate PACs and LLCs.
But the truth is we don't have to outraise them. We just need to make sure we don't fall too far behind, and these emails are how we do that. The overwhelming majority of our donations come from supporters like you giving small amounts of money in response to emails like this. That adds up. Big time.
So that's why I'm asking:
**[Can you make a $3 donation right now before tomorrow's deadline? Every donation matters. Each one sends a message about the strength of our campaign.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eb9/6e822e2f/1bcca0e0/4172736a/3539678016/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTEtMi1iIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180711-2-b")**
I'm proud of how we're funding this campaign. The New York Attorney General is supposed to be the people's attorney, which means the people must have no doubt about her independence. She must be willing to root out corruption wherever it may exist.
So if you're able to add a contribution, it would go a long way. Thank you again for standing with us.
Best,
Zephyr Teachout
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eb9/6e822e2f/1bcca0e0/4172736a/3539678016/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTEtMi1iIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180711-2-b")**

* * *

Friends: Now that Donald Trump has nominated Brett Kavanaugh to fill the critical swing seat on the U.S. Supreme Court, the stakes could not be higher.

This headline broke today: "Brutal Poll: Democrats' Senate dreams slipping away." The article says Senate races are tightening all across the country.

**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9c2/4462dc26/5538a0a5/20079e84/1758175192/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzExIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180711?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180711_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9c2/4462dc26/5538a0a5/20079e85/1758175192/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzExIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180711?refcode=sbe180711_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**

Sherrod
